headlines.title: Avoid 'reactive' police reforms after Nowak murder, senior black officer warns
headlines.description: The head of the National Black Police Association says proposed changes to racism guidance are "not well thought-out".

headlines.title: Starmer accuses Musk of trying to whip up division over Henry Nowak murder
headlines.description: X-owner Musk has posted several times on the site criticising the police treatment of Henry Nowak.

headlines.title: New NHS drug offers ovarian cancer patients more time and better quality of life
headlines.description: Women taking the drug, which is kinder on the body, tell the BBC it has given them their lives back.

headlines.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
headlines.description: The countries reject "any attempt, by any state or non-state actor, to hold Lebanon's future hostage", the US says.

headlines.title: NHS staff should be banned from wearing pro-Palestinian badges, report recommends
headlines.description: The recommendation is one of several from Lord Mann, whose review examined antisemitism within the organisation.

headlines.title: What a hair loss breakthrough could mean for women like me
headlines.description: As scientists edge closer to new treatments for hair loss, Victoria Derbyshire examines what such breakthroughs could mean for women.

headlines.title: Harry and Meghan celebrate Lilibet's fifth birthday
headlines.description: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex share a picture of their daughter Lilibet, calling her "our dream girl".

headlines.title: Falling pupil numbers should lead to smaller class sizes, says union
headlines.description: The union argues that instead of cutting teacher recruitment, the government should use falling pupil numbers to make class sizes smaller.

headlines.title: Ukraine accused of killing four in occupied Crimea
headlines.description: At least 10 people have been injured in the attacks, according to Russian-backed officials.

headlines.title: Missing Mandelson messages from minister Darren Jones revealed
headlines.description: Messages were expected to appear in the batch of Mandelson files, published earlier this week, but did not.

headlines.title: Bob Harris to step down from Radio 2 after 56 years on air
headlines.description: The broadcaster, who is being treated for cancer, called it "the hardest decision" he'd ever made.

headlines.title: Black Hawks and robodogs - how one Mexican city is preparing for the World Cup
headlines.description: BBC’s Will Grant got a first-hand look at security preparations in Monterrey, as the city gets ready to host four matches.

headlines.title: Our estate was labelled a war zone after the riot - but the reality is very different
headlines.description: People from Mayhill and Townhill say perceptions of their estate are very different to the reality.

headlines.title: I left a children's home – and was embraced by love
headlines.description: How a new scheme for young people leaving care is tackling what was once a cliff-edge for this vulnerable group.

headlines.title: Grab what you can while you can: The new reality in the South China Sea
headlines.description: After years of watching China create land to back its expansive claims, others are doing the same.

headlines.title: 'My daughter didn't know her own name': Scooter crash in India left student with brain injuries
headlines.description: Olivia, 21, still has no recollection of the crash that left her in a coma in a Goa hospital.

headlines.title: Exams watchdog warns of rise in high-tech cheating
headlines.description: Ofqual chief says invigilators are being trained to detect devices like smart glasses and hidden earpieces.

headlines.title: US House delivers rebuke to Trump as it votes to halt Iran war
headlines.description: In the 215-208 vote, four Republicans joined Democrats to pass the measure, which is largely symbolic.

headlines.title: Royal Navy helicopter crash investigations continue
headlines.description: There are floral tributes at the scene where three crew members died on Wednesday.

headlines.title: Miracle on Everest: Guide believed dead spotted crawling down ice
headlines.description: Cleaners found Dawa Sherpa crawling towards Base Camp six days after he went missing at a higher altitude.

headlines.title: SpaceX says it's worth $1.75tn as it targets largest stock market debut
headlines.description: Elon Musk’s space exploration company set a target share price for buyers earlier than expected.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: By-Electioncast: Chris Reports Back From Makerfield
headlines.description: What's happening on the ground in the Makerfield by-election campaign?

headlines.title: Does the US need new laws to protect elections?
headlines.description: And, why does Donald Trump want to “nationalise” elections?

headlines.title: Man City consider legal action over Real candidate's promise to sign Haaland
headlines.description: After a candidate in Real Madrid's presidential election unveils an Erling Haaland shirt on live TV, Manchester City dismiss the suggestion their striker will move to Spain.

headlines.title: Ukraine-Russia tension hangs over French Open semi-finals
headlines.description: Russia's war in Ukraine will provide an unavoidable backdrop to the French Open women's semi-finals - and possibly the final.

headlines.title: A higher ceiling than Messi? What next for Lamine Yamal?
headlines.description: Lamine Yamal is a key figure in Spain's World Cup squad, but why is the 18-year-old quick to dismiss Messi comparisons?

headlines.title: Trump says 'Eiffel Tower' like UFC structure may stay
headlines.description: President Donald Trump says he may choose to leave a purpose-built UFC arena standing at the White House because it is "attractive to a lot of people".

headlines.title: After coaching merry-go-round have Leicester finally found long-term boss?
headlines.description: He's their 10th head coach in just over a decade. After a successful first season, have Leicester Tigers finally found a long-term boss in Geoff Parling?

headlines.title: Heat experts warn 'reckless' Fifa of bottle ban health risk
headlines.description: Fans will not be allowed to take reusable water bottles into World Cup stadiums due to safety concerns, Fifa says in a late policy change.
